lessonsLearned.lesson: ZMDE's '1000 Years' format is a repeatable pattern - time compression drives engagement
StevenSongIRL's thief-bait format massively outperforms (15-40x subscriber count)
Price comparison format works best for high-stakes categories (cars > toys)
Always run syntax check (node --check) before pushing JavaScript
Dashboard is the default destination - all work feeds into it
APPEND new data, never replace entire JSON files
